_capture_note: Hand-crafted OSV /v1/querybatch response for NuGet/Newtonsoft.Json@12.0.0 → CVE-2024-21907. Refresh: curl -sS -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' --data '{"queries":[{"package":{"ecosystem":"NuGet","name":"Newtonsoft.Json"},"version":"12.0.0"}]}' https://api.osv.dev/v1/querybatch

vulns.summary: Newtonsoft.Json before 13.0.1 mishandles deeply nested JSON (StackOverflow → DoS)
